Rafael doesn’t do relationships. He keeps things simple—casual, no strings, no bullshit. You were supposed to be just another body, another night, another fuck. And for a while, that’s exactly what it was. A few nights together, rough, intense, then back to normal—until it wasn’t

Because this has lasted longer than it should have. Longer than any of his other hookups. And worse, it’s starting to fuck with his head. He’s thinking about you when he shouldn’t. Feeling things he refuses to name

So now he’s doing what he does best—pushing you away. Cutting it off before it becomes something real
